DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-04-2002 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Disqualify The Law Offices Of Andrew Zacks For Representation Of Pltf, Memo P/A Declarations
Off Calendar Apr-11-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: A P P E A R A N C E S:
Stephen L. Collier, Esq. of the TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC771-9850 for Defendants and moving to disqualify the Law Offices of ANDREW ZACKS for representation of Plaintiff
Paul F. Utrecht, Esq. 956-8100 for Andrew Zacks, Esq. opposing party (Andrew Zacks, Esq. 956-8100 also present)
Paul W. Vapnek, Esq. of TOWNSEND & TOWNSEND 576-0200 for Andrew Zacks, Esq. opposing party
Counsel informed that the declarations are admitted without objection. There was an objection as to Ms. Schwalbe's declaration, specifically the second sentence of Paragraph 5 -- objection overruled. Also, Mr. Vapnek's request to strike Exhibit H was sustained by the Court. The Court ordered an evidentiary hearing on this motion which proceeded as follows:
9:44 a.m. Brigitta Schwalbe was sworn and examined on behalf of Defendants
9:45 a.m. direct examination by Stephen L. Collier, Esq.
9:48 a.m. cross-examination by Paul W. Vapnek, Esq.
9:50 a.m. examination by the Court
9:55 a.m. Andrew Zacks, Esq. was sworn and examined on his own behalf
9:58 a.m. cross-examination by Stephen L. Collier, Esq.
10:00 a.m. re-direct by Paul W. Vapnek, Esq.
10:01 a.m. cross-cross-examination by Stephen L. Collier, ESq.
10:02 a.m. examination by the Court
Witnesses having testified, the Court entertained argument by counsel. Argued and the Court took this matter under SUBMISSION. The motion for summary judgment was continued to
M A R C H 1 3, 2 0 0 2 for hearing. (JJM/kh)
